core_mechanism: choosing a reducible (direct-sum/direct-integral) representation of an abstract algebra defined by canonical commutation/anticommutation relations, so its generators are realized as well-defined bounded operators rather than singular objects, instead of the standard irreducible representation
brief_reason: The abstract applies reducible representations of the CAR/CCR algebra (an algebra fixed by (anti)commutation relations) to quantization so that the resulting operators are genuine operators and not operator-valued distributions.
